# Yaris A. Nadaf

> Personal portfolio of Yaris A. Nadaf — backend engineer, full stack developer, AI/ML developer, and IoT builder.

Final-year B.E. student in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, with three industry internships and projects spanning backend systems, full-stack products, applied AI, and embedded hardware.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction, skills, education, experience, projects, achievements, contact.

## Experience

- [Full Stack Development Intern — Arlig Technologies](/experience/arlig-technologies): React, Node.js, PostgreSQL production work.
- [Java & DBMS Intern — Karunadu Technologies](/experience/karunadu-java-dbms): Java services and relational schema design.
- [HTML, CSS & JavaScript Intern — Karunadu Technologies](/experience/karunadu-web-fundamentals): Responsive marketing pages and interactive components.

## Projects

- [IntelliScreen](/projects/intelliscreen): AI resume screening platform with explainable scoring.
- [Result Analyzer](/projects/result-analyzer): OCR-based academic analytics from scanned PDFs.
- [NAIN 2.0](/projects/nain-2): Interactive Raspberry Pi robot with LLM-driven voice and motion.

- [National Hackathon Winner](/achievements/national-hackathon-winner)
- [IEEE Poster Presentation](/achievements/ieee-poster-presentation)
- [Government Innovation Project](/achievements/government-innovation-project)
